originalTitle: Ghana calls on Commonwealth to condemn attack on its peacekeepers in Lebanon
title: Ghana calls on Commonwealth to condemn attack on its peacekeepers in Lebanon
content: Four soldiers were injured but all are now in a stable condition, Ghana's army says.

originalTitle: Guinea opposition leader urges 'direct resistance' after 40 parties dissolved
title: Guinea opposition leader urges 'direct resistance' after 40 parties dissolved
content: Cellou Dalein Diallo accuses the junta-leader-turned-president of erasing political threats.

originalTitle: Bitter times for cocoa farmers as chocolate market slumps
title: Bitter times for cocoa farmers as chocolate market slumps
content: Chocolate bars may have shot up in price but West Africa's cocoa farmers are facing economic ruin.

originalTitle: Putin says Russia can supply oil, gas to Europe as energy prices soar
title: Putin says Russia can supply oil, gas to Europe as energy prices soar
content: Russian president spoke as oil prices surged past $100 per barrel, reaching levels unseen since start of Ukraine war.

originalTitle: Why Israel’s war on Hezbollah keeps returning
title: Why Israel’s war on Hezbollah keeps returning
content: Israel has tried for decades to weaken Hezbollah through wars and assassinations. Why has the group endured?

originalTitle: What is Trump’s endgame in Iran as the US-Israel war escalates?
title: What is Trump’s endgame in Iran as the US-Israel war escalates?
content: As strikes continue across Iran, US President Trump has articulated shifting goals. But how likely are they?

originalTitle: Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader?
title: Who is Mojtaba Khamenei, Iran's new supreme leader?
content: Many expect the 56-year-old, who has largely kept a low profile, to continue his father's hardline policies.

originalTitle: US teacher killed after toilet paper prank goes wrong
title: US teacher killed after toilet paper prank goes wrong
content: Jason Hughes's family does not want the students prosecuted after the  prank turned into  a fatal car accident.

originalTitle: G7 to take 'necessary measures' to support energy supplies
title: G7 to take 'necessary measures' to support energy supplies
content: Finance ministers and the IEA discussed options for stabilising oil prices which surpassed $100.

originalTitle: Man City host Liverpool, Port Vale face Chelsea - full FA Cup draw
title: Man City host Liverpool, Port Vale face Chelsea - full FA Cup draw
content: League One Port Vale's reward for beating Sunderland in the FA Cup is a quarter-final tie away to Chelsea, while Manchester City will host Liverpool in a heavyweight showdown.

originalTitle: Alisson injury not 'a big thing' despite missing Galatasaray
title: Alisson injury not 'a big thing' despite missing Galatasaray
content: Liverpool goalkeeper Alisson is ruled out of the first leg of their Champions League tie against Galatasaray through injury - but could return to face Tottenham at the weekend.

originalTitle: Should lower-ranked teams always play at home in the FA Cup?
title: Should lower-ranked teams always play at home in the FA Cup?
content: After some superb FA Cup fifth-round ties, BBC Sport looks at whether lower-ranked teams should always get to play at home.
